error_signature: Param recipient[id] must be a valid ID string
title: Invalid ID string for recipient parameter
symptom: When attempting to send a request, n8n throws an error indicating that the recipient ID must be a valid ID string.
applies_when: Recipient ID is being passed as a parameter
not_this_if: The ID is correctly formatted and valid according to the API documentation
root_cause: The error occurs when the ID provided for the recipient does not conform to the expected format or is not recognized by the API. This can happen if the ID is missing, incorrectly formatted, or if it does not exist in the system.
fix_steps: Check the API documentation for the correct ID format
Ensure that the ID being passed is a valid string
Update the workflow with the correct ID
agent_instruction: Verify and correct the recipient ID format according to the API requirements.
